calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Sarah Shaw was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minor, Alana Naomi Hunte.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Proof of Publication in file. Proof of Service re: notification of minor's father in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Alana Naomi Shaw.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-08-2008 Reset To May-22-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner, Sarah Shaw, was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minor Alana Naomi Hunte, who was not present at today's hearing.

Petitioner did not provide the Court with Proof of Service of the Application and Declaration in Support of Order Dispensing with Notice to the Minor's Father of the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name of the Minor.

Good cause appearing, the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name of the Minor, Alana Naomi Hunte, is continued to May 22, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.

Reissuance of the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
